title: Update module github.com/containers/common to v0.51.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.50.1` -> `v0.51.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common</summary>

### [`v0.51.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.51.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.50.1...v0.51.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v0.50.1 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1170](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1170)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/image-spec from 1.1.0-rc1 to 1.1.0-rc2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1171](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1171)
-   GHA: Limit operations to `main` branch only by [@​cevich](https://togithub.com/cevich) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1175](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1175)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.20.2 to 1.21.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1179](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1179)
-   Fix empty system context when copy image from oci-archive transport by [@​tyler92](https://togithub.com/tyler92) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1181](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1181)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/containers/ocicrypt from 1.1.5 to 1.1.6 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1180](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1180)
